findings.title: Missing meta description
findings.recommendation: Add a compelling 140–160 character summary with the target query.

findings.title: Images missing alt text
findings.detail: 3 of 26 tags have no alt attribute.
findings.recommendation: Add descriptive alt text (empty alt="" only for decorative images).

findings.title: Links with no anchor text
findings.recommendation: Give links descriptive anchor text for users and crawlers.

findings.title: No XML sitemap found
findings.detail: No sitemap.xml at the common locations or in robots.txt.
findings.recommendation: Publish an XML sitemap and submit it in Search Console.

findings.title: Dominant topics detected
findings.detail: narwhal (73), narwhals (72), january (37), retrieved (34), marine (25), tusks (24)  ·  phrases: monodon monoceros, heide-j rgensen, rgensen mads

findings.title: Repetitive vocabulary
findings.recommendation: Vary wording and add substance; heavy repetition signals thin or spun content.

findings.title: No visible author/byline
findings.detail: No author meta tag or byline detected near the top.
findings.recommendation: Add a named author with credentials — a core E-E-A-T (experience/expertise) signal.

findings.title: No visible date signal
findings.detail: No published/modified date in metadata or near the top.
findings.recommendation: Expose a publish or last-updated date to signal freshness.

findings.title: Incomplete Open Graph tags
findings.recommendation: Add og:title, og:description and og:image for rich social and chat-app link previews.

findings.title: No Twitter/X card type
findings.recommendation: Add twitter:card (e.g. summary_large_image) for X previews.

findings.title: No Organization/WebSite entity
findings.detail: No site-level Organization or WebSite markup detected.
findings.recommendation: Add Organization + WebSite JSON-LD (typically sitewide) to establish the publishing entity.

findings.title: Few question-based headings
findings.detail: 0 of 19 subheadings are phrased as questions.
findings.recommendation: Rewrite key H2/H3s as the questions users actually ask — AI engines match answers to question-shaped headings.

findings.title: No direct answer up top
findings.detail: The opening doesn't state a concise answer/definition.
findings.recommendation: Lead with a 1–2 sentence direct answer before the details; AI overviews lift the top summary.

findings.title: No llms.txt
findings.recommendation: Optionally publish /llms.txt to guide AI crawlers to your key content. Evidence for ranking impact is still thin — treat as low-cost, low-certainty.
